name: Agent Adapter
summary: Adapter pattern for pluggable AI agent backends. Defines the AgentAdapter interface with session creation, message sending, and streaming. ClaudeCodeAdapter implements this using the Anthropic Claude Agent SDK.
goals: Define a generic AgentAdapter interface for any AI agent backend
Support session creation, restoration, and message streaming
Handle nested agent calls (agent dispatch) with call stack tracking

design.overview: AgentAdapter abstract interface with methods for create, sendMessage, restore, and destroy. ClaudeCodeAdapter wraps the Claude Agent SDK, managing session lifecycle and streaming events. Supports model discovery and nested agent dispatch.

acceptanceCriteria.given: A valid session configuration is provided
acceptanceCriteria.then: a new SDK session is initialized and ready for messages

acceptanceCriteria.given: An existing session ID is provided
acceptanceCriteria.then: the session resumes with its previous context

end-to-end.when: a message is sent to a created session
end-to-end.then: events are streamed back including text and tool use

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
